top_signals.title: Vigilant ECB Hasn’t Yet Seen Second-Round Effects, Villeroy Says
top_signals.summary: A spike in energy costs hasn’t yet turned into second-round effects in other parts of the euro-area economy, according to outgoing European Central Bank Governing Council member Francois Villeroy de Galhau.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Peter Murrell pleads guilty to embezzling £400,000 from SNP
top_signals.summary: Former party chief executive and ex-husband of Nicola Sturgeon will be detained until sentencing on June 23
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: The energy shock is not over yet
top_signals.summary: Even with a deal to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, supplies will take time to normalise
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
